_doc: Silicon-side functor G : C_atlas → C_silicon — declarative companion to F (config/invariants.json). Hardware architecture constants from atlas.n6 that project onto silicon implementation. Axis C from R24+27 witness closure roadmap.

functor_G.relationship_to_F: F ∩ G = {warp_size} — single known crossover atom (R24+12). G covers atlas constants describing physical parallel execution units, register layouts, thermal/power envelopes. F covers engine meta structure.
functor_G.preservation_class: cartesian closed symmetric monoidal additive (assumed — by atlas semiring homomorphism)
functor_G.enforcement_status: not-yet-implemented — no scanner reads this file. Future gate: P42 candidate for silicon_functor schema presence.

warp_size.meaning: GPU 최소 parallel-coherent execution unit (NVIDIA warp)
warp_size.crossover_with_F: P32 phase index — R24+12 architecture-tier crossover

cross_functor_topology.F_image: algebraic foundation + engine meta structure (45 scanners, 10 atoms, 5 relations, 4 orbits)
cross_functor_topology.G_image: silicon hardware structure (warp_size, SMs, register file, max threads, carbon substrate)
cross_functor_topology.shared_foundation: C_atlas (atlas.n6 foundation atoms n, sigma, phi, tau, sopfr, mu, ...)
cross_functor_topology.triangle_structure: math foundation → { F (software engine), G (silicon hardware) } — both derive from same n=6 algebraic base; F ∩ G is the subset observable from both sides.

silicon_tier_semiring_check.expected_preservation: G should preserve {+, -, ·, /, ^} just like F, since atlas semiring is shared. Formulas show all silicon atoms derive from foundation via {+, ·, ^}.
silicon_tier_semiring_check.note: All 4 spot-checked silicon atoms verify against atom-semiring computation. G is therefore a valid faithful monoidal functor on this subset.

enforcement_future.P42_candidate: silicon manifest schema presence (analogous to P36)
enforcement_future.P44_candidate: G ∩ F crossover verification (warp_size both sides match)
enforcement_future.note: Not yet a gate — declarative only. Axis C from R24+27 witness closure completed in document form.
